## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix

## Test plan

<!-- How did you test this? -->

- [ ] `pytest tests/ -v` passes
- [ ] Manually tested the happy path
- [ ] Added / updated golden dataset if new decision logic was added
- [ ] Updated `docs/` if an API or config option changed
- [ ] Added entry to `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]`

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows project style (no unnecessary comments, named clearly)
- [ ] No secrets or credentials committed
- [ ] PR title follows conventional commit format (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, etc.)
